title: NZ Easter Holiday Ideas for Families 2026
meta_desc: Where to go these Easter holidays in NZ with kids. Best autumn destinations, what's open over the long weekend, events, and costs — plus booking tips.
intro: Easter falls in autumn in New Zealand — mild, settled weather and one of the best long weekends of the year for a family getaway. This guide covers the best Easter destinations for families, what's actually open over the trading-restricted days, Easter events and egg hunts, and how to book a long-weekend trip without paying peak prices.
h2_outline: Why Easter is a great time to travel NZ with kids
What's open over Easter (trading restrictions explained)
Easter events and egg hunts for families
Booking tips for the long weekend

sections.heading: Why Easter Is a Great Time to Travel NZ with Kids
sections.body: The Easter long weekend lands in early autumn, when NZ weather is often at its most settled — warm days, cool nights, and far smaller crowds than summer. With Good Friday and Easter Monday both public holidays, families get a four-day window perfect for a road trip or a short break close to home.

sections.heading: Best Easter Long-Weekend Destinations
list: Coromandel and Bay of Islands — last of the warm-enough beach weather
Rotorua and Taupo — geothermal warmth and rain-safe activities
Hawke's Bay — autumn harvest, art deco, family wineries with playgrounds
Central Otago — autumn colour around Wanaka and Arrowtown

sections.heading: What's Open Over Easter
sections.body: Good Friday and Easter Sunday are restricted trading days in NZ — many shops must close, though cafes, restaurants, petrol stations, and most tourist attractions can stay open. Supermarkets are closed Good Friday and Easter Sunday morning, so stock up beforehand. Easter Monday trades normally.

sections.heading: Easter Events and Egg Hunts
list: Botanic garden and farm-park egg hunts in most main centres
Easter A&P shows and autumn fairs
Holiday-park organised egg hunts for guests
Zoo and wildlife-park Easter trails (Auckland, Wellington, Orana)

faq.question: Where should we go for Easter in NZ with kids?
faq.answer: Autumn-friendly spots like the Coromandel, Rotorua, Taupo, Hawke's Bay and Central Otago all work well over Easter — mild weather, smaller crowds, and plenty of family events and egg hunts.

faq.question: What's open over Easter weekend in New Zealand?
faq.answer: Good Friday and Easter Sunday are restricted trading days — most shops close, but cafes, petrol stations and tourist attractions can stay open. Supermarkets close Good Friday and Easter Sunday morning, so shop ahead. Easter Monday trades normally.

faq.question: Is Easter a good time for a family holiday in NZ?
faq.answer: Yes — the four-day long weekend, settled autumn weather and lower crowds make Easter one of the best value times for a short family trip or road trip. Book accommodation a few weeks ahead as popular spots fill up.

hero_image.alt: Family Easter egg hunt at a New Zealand park in autumn
